How to use generative AI responsibly | Studying in a digital world
AI tools for education - University of Warwick
Microsoft Copilot GenAI now available for students
Responsible AI tool selection for researchers
Gen AI Tools - Artificial Intelligence (AI) - Library Guides

stopConditions: Only source-backed tool-level records are staged.
Broad AI guidance is not expanded into named tool conclusions.
Generic model-family descriptions are not promoted unless presented as concrete tools.

methodsAttempted.query: site:lunduniversity.lu.se OR site:lu.se Lund University generative AI tools approved ChatGPT Copilot Gemini AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Official staff and student pages identified Lund-provided AI tools.

artifacts.summary: Lund official pages provided tool-level evidence for Copilot, DeepL, ChatGPT Edu, Copilot Chat, and Google Gemini.

methodsAttempted.query: site:warwick.ac.uk University of Warwick generative AI tools approved Copilot ChatGPT AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Official AI tools page identified Copilot as recommended.

artifacts.summary: Warwick official AI tools page provided tool-level evidence for Copilot.

methodsAttempted.query: site:birmingham.ac.uk University of Birmingham generative AI tools approved Copilot ChatGPT AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Official student and researcher pages identified university Copilot access.

artifacts.summary: Birmingham official pages provided tool-level evidence for Microsoft Copilot access.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uwa.edu.au University of Western Australia generative AI tools approved Copilot ChatGPT AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Official UWA Library Guide listed provided and blocked AI tools.

artifacts.summary: UWA official guide provided tool-level records for Copilot, Adobe Express, DeepSeek, EndNote, Miro, and PowerPoint AI features.

methodsAttempted.query: site:kth.se KTH Royal Institute Technology generative AI tools approved Copilot ChatGPT AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Official KTH AI services page listed three AI services.

artifacts.summary: KTH official AI services page provided records for Copilot Chat, ChatGPT, and Azure OpenAI Service.

methodsAttempted.query: University of Glasgow Microsoft Copilot generative AI tool official university ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Official MyGlasgow IT page identified Copilot Chat as approved for University data.

artifacts.summary: Glasgow official IT page provided tool-level evidence for Microsoft Copilot Chat.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uni-heidelberg.de Universität Heidelberg generative AI tools approved ChatGPT Copilot KI Tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Official computing center page identified YoKI and heiBOT-IT.

artifacts.summary: Heidelberg official URZ page provided tool-level records for YoKI and heiBOT-IT.

artifacts.title: QS 71-80 AI tools extraction
artifacts.summary: AI tools staging extraction for QS rows 71-80, with tool-level records only where official pages named provided, recommended, or restricted tools.
limitations: Tool-level records are derived from official source-backed text and are not official university conclusions.
Broad AI guidance and generic model-family mentions were not expanded into named tool availability records.
No legal, academic-integrity, privacy, or procurement advice is provided.
